data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'substitution history tracking' feature, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any checks or reads that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement for substitution history tracking.
gaps: No evidence of substitution history tracking implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for substitution history tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that substitution history is being tracked and can be retrieved.
